title: bank of england / hank model / monetary transmission | Research Paper | A UK-HANK model
summary: The Bank of England released a Macro Technical Paper describing a medium-scale Heterogeneous Agent New Keynesian (HANK) model calibrated to the UK economy, incorporating household heterogeneity, housing, international, and fiscal blocks. The model is used to decompose monetary transmission channels and assess their relative importance across different household groups. Key findings include that mortgagors' consumption is most sensitive to house price changes, and that shifts in household balance sheets over the past two decades have dampened the transmission of interest rate changes to prices.
